flags.note: ἀγάπη — "love" vs. "charity" (KJV) vs. "self-giving love." Distinct from φιλία (warm affection) and ἔρως (desire). The MKT Thought tier expands to "self-giving love."
λόγος — "word" (utterance) vs. "Word" (divine Person in John 1) vs. "Reason/Logic" (Greek philosophical sense). John's prologue deliberately evokes all three.
πίστις — "faith" (subjective trust) vs. "faithfulness" (objective reliability). "Faith of Christ" (G1342 Χριστοῦ) may mean trust IN Christ or the faithfulness OF Christ.
χάρις — "grace" (unmerited favor) vs. "favor" (patron's gift in social context). The patron-client background charges this word with economic and social concreteness.
